languages.text: "Это шутка? Даргонус в опасности. Отец в опасности! А вы предлагаете обсуждать убранство дворца?!" {n}Лария сжимает кулаки так, что белеют костяшки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Это шутка? Даргонус в опасности. Отец в опасности! А вы предлагаете обсуждать убранство дворца?!" {n}Лария сжимает кулаки так, что белеют костяшки.{/n}

languages.text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Это шутка? Даргонус в опасности. Отец в опасности! А вы предлагаете обсуждать убранство дворца?!" {n}Лария сжимает кулаки так, что белеют костяшки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}
"Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}
"Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

languages.text: “你开什么玩笑？达戈努斯危在旦夕，父亲也身陷险境，你却想跟我讨论宫殿的装潢？”{n}菈丽雅攥紧拳头，指节都泛了白。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “你开什么玩笑？达戈努斯危在旦夕，父亲也身陷险境，你却想跟我讨论宫殿的装潢？”{n}菈丽雅攥紧拳头，指节都泛了白。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est une plaisanterie ? Dargonus est en grand danger ! Mon père risque sa vie, et vous voudriez discuter de la décoration du palais ? » {n}Laria serre les poings à s'en blanchir les jointures.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est une plaisanterie ? Dargonus est en grand danger ! Mon père risque sa vie, et vous voudriez discuter de la décoration du palais ? » {n}Laria serre les poings à s'en blanchir les jointures.{/n}

languages.text: "Şaka mı bu? Dargonus tehlikede. Babam tehlikede! Siz de gelmiş bana saray dekorasyonunu anlatıyorsunuz." {n}Laria, yumruklarını o kadar sıkıyor ki eklemleri beyazlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Şaka mı bu? Dargonus tehlikede. Babam tehlikede! Siz de gelmiş bana saray dekorasyonunu anlatıyorsunuz." {n}Laria, yumruklarını o kadar sıkıyor ki eklemleri beyazlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Es esto una broma? Dargonus está en peligro. ¡Mi padre está en peligro! ¿Y usted quiere hablar sobre la decoración del palacio?». {n}Laria aprieta tanto los puños que sus nudillos se vuelven blancos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Es esto una broma? Dargonus está en peligro. ¡Mi padre está en peligro! ¿Y usted quiere hablar sobre la decoración del palacio?». {n}Laria aprieta tanto los puños que sus nudillos se vuelven blancos.{/n}

languages.text: "Soll das ein Witz sein? Dargonus ist in Gefahr. Vater ist in Gefahr! Und Ihr wollt über die Einrichtung des Palastes reden?" {n}Laria ballt ihre Fäuste so fest, dass sich ihre Knöchel weiß färben.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Soll das ein Witz sein? Dargonus ist in Gefahr. Vater ist in Gefahr! Und Ihr wollt über die Einrichtung des Palastes reden?" {n}Laria ballt ihre Fäuste so fest, dass sich ihre Knöchel weiß färben.{/n}

languages.text: 「これは冗談ですか？ドラゴナスが危険にさらされている。父も危険にさらされている。そして、あなたは宮殿の装飾について議論したいのですか？」{n}ラリアは拳を握りしめて、指の関節が白くなるほど力を入れた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is this some kind of joke? Dargonus is in danger. Father is in danger! And you want to discuss palace decor?" {n}Laria clenches her fists so tightly that her knuckles turn white.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「これは冗談ですか？ドラゴナスが危険にさらされている。父も危険にさらされている。そして、あなたは宮殿の装飾について議論したいのですか？」{n}ラリアは拳を握りしめて、指の関節が白くなるほど力を入れた。{/n}
